name: Mailchimp
description: Manage email campaigns, audiences, and marketing analytics in Mailchimp.
setup_notes:
Intuit (Mailchimp's parent company) is partnering with Anthropic
to bring official MCP integrations for Mailchimp.
Expected availability: Spring 2026.

A transactional messaging MCP endpoint is available at:
https://mandrillapp.com/mcp

Use Smart Discovery to find current options.
